content:
Manage a team of agents from your desktop

Proliferate is the open, harness-agnostic platform for running coding agents- Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, whatever comes next- in parallel, locally and in the cloud. We think the next decade of software gets built by engineers directing fleets of agents, and that layer shouldn't belong to any one model vendor. We're building it.

We're backed by True Ventures, Pear VC, and 50+ YC founders, with plenty of money to keep building through rough patches. We work in person in SoMa, San Francisco.

I'm Pablo. I finished my master's in AI at 19, joined Onyx (YC W24) as engineer #1, spent a year building enterprise AI search, then started Proliferate. You'd be hire #1- we'd work side by side every day, and there is a lot of room to grow.

For exceptional people, we're happy to be exceptional- especially on equity.
chineseContent:
从您的桌面管理代理团队

Proliferate 是一个开放的、与工具无关的平台，用于并行、本地和云端运行编码代理（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等）。我们认为，未来十年的软件将由工程师指导代理团队构建，并且该层不应该属于任何一个模型供应商。我们正在建造它。

我们得到了 True Ventures、Pear VC 和 50 多位 YC 创始人的支持，有足够的资金来度过困难时期继续建设。我们在旧金山 SoMa 亲自工作。

我是巴勃罗。我在 19 岁时完成了人工智能硕士学位，加入 Onyx (YC W24) 作为 1 号工程师，花了一年时间构建企业人工智能搜索，然后开始了 Proliferate。你会被聘用#1——我们每天并肩工作，并且有很大的成长空间。

对于杰出的人才，我们很高兴成为杰出的人——尤其是在公平方面。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
